response.overview: Izzy (12) and her father Koos (40) are waiting for Izzy’s mother, who will be coming home for the first time in twelve years. But as the evening goes on and Koos starts behaving more and more strangely, Izzy begins to wonder whether her father can really be trusted. Will her mother actually come? KOSMOS is a short fiction pilot.
response.title: Kosmos
